layer_regeneration_attempt.raw_response_preview:
{
  "replacement_blocks": [
    {
      "start_line": 13,
      "end_line": 49,
      "text": "   processor mover_ctrl WSF_SCRIPT_PROCESSOR
      update_interval 5 sec
      on_update
         MOVER mv = PLATFORM.GetMover()
         double t = PROCESSOR.UpdateTime()
         if t < 30
            mv.SetDesiredSpeed(100 m/sec)
         endif
         if t >= 30
            if t < 60
               mv.SetDesiredSpeed(150 m/sec)
            endif
         endif
         if t >= 60
            mv.SetDesiredSpeed(200 m/sec)
         endif
      end_on_update
   end_processor"
    }
  ]
}
layer_regeneration_attempt.repaired_text:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

platform_type TEST_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_AIR_MOVER
      maximum_speed 1 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
      maximum_altitude 50000 ft
      minimum_altitude 0 ft
      at_end_of_path stop
   end_mover
   processor mover_ctrl WSF_SCRIPT_PROCESSOR
      update_interval 5 sec
      on_update
         MOVER mv = PLATFORM.GetMover()
         double t = PROCESSOR.UpdateTime()
         if t < 30
            mv.SetDesiredSpeed(100 m/sec)
         endif
         if t >= 30
            if t < 60
               mv.SetDesiredSpeed(150 m/sec)
            endif
         endif
         if t >= 60
            mv.SetDesiredSpeed(200 m/sec)
         endif
      end_on_update
   end_processor

platform scripted_platform TEST_TYPE
   side blue
   route
      position 30.0n 120.0e altitude 10000 ft msl speed 200 m/sec
      position 30.5n 120.5e altitude 10000 ft msl speed 200 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

event_pipe
   file output/proc_mover_demo.aer
end_event_pipe

end_platform_type
end_time 120 sec
